source.title: AWS Cloud Engineer - Baseline/Nv1 required

AWS Cloud Engineer - Baseline/Nv1 required

Upload a current résumé to your profile to see better matches
Was this skills match accurate?


Help us match better. We match your skills and credentials based on your profile and default resumé but we might not always get it right.
Hide all⁠

AWS Cloud Engineer - $900 per day
AWS DevOps Engineer - $820 per day
  
12-Month Contracts - Sydney or Canberra – Hybrid
Baseline Clearance Required

We are looking to fill two contract positions supporting a large-scale government platform program. Both roles are hands-on, working as part of a cross-functional team to build, manage, and uplift AWS environments in accordance with government requirements.

Role 1 — AWS Cloud Engineer $900 per day (super included / + GST)
Critical Skills
Expert EKS/Kubernetes — cluster build, multi-tenant design, RBAC, networking, storage
AWS cloud engineering — IAM, KMS, EFS/EBS, EC2 worker nodes, VPC design
Infrastructure as Code — Terraform / CDK, container lifecycle management
Kubernetes security — isolation, secrets management, scanning, hardened workloads
Observability — logging, metrics, autoscaling, SRE patterns
Role 2 — AWS DevOps Engineer $820 per day (super included / + GST)
Critical Skills
CI/CD pipeline build and management using Azure DevOps
Git repository management
Infrastructure as Code — Terraform / AWS CDK / CloudFormation
AWS core services and day-to-day operations support
Ansible for server configuration and automation
Container build and management — Docker / Podman
ECS & Fargate workload deployment and management
Baseline security clearance is required before commencement(active or expired). Candidates may apply for one or both roles.

If this sounds like you, click apply now or email - Brad.Weaver@PRA.com.au
